Source URL: https://www.score.org/mentors/

# SCORE Find a Mentor Process

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, find-mentor, mentor-request, human-referral

## Resource purpose
SCORE mentor search/request page for finding mentors by expertise, industry, location, and chapter.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the model has diagnosed that a user needs experienced human guidance and is ready to request a mentor. For Houston-area users, combine this with the SCORE Houston local page.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages, especially when a decision is complex, risky, or needs operator judgment.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs who need one-on-one guidance, accountability, or industry-specific mentoring.

## Route the user here when
The client needs more than a link or article: they need judgment, feedback, accountability, or a person to help sequence next steps.

## Useful intake questions before referral
- What mentor expertise is most important: industry, finance, marketing, operations, legal setup education, nonprofit, funding readiness, or government contracting pathway?
- Do you prefer local Houston/Katy-area guidance or are you comfortable with a virtual specialist anywhere in SCORE’s network?
- What is the current stage and next decision?
- What have you already done?

## Source notes captured for BOSS
- The mentor search page allows browsing by expertise, industry, and location, and requesting a mentor session.
- Counts of mentors by state/city can change; use the live page for current availability.

## BOSS routing notes
- For Ideation, recommend a mentor before legal/entity decisions if the concept and customer are not clear yet.
- For Houston users, mention SCORE Houston as the local chapter and SCORE national as a broader virtual specialist bench.
- If a mentor match is not perfect, advise the user to ask SCORE whether another mentor can join or be recommended.

## Related SCORE links
- SCORE Houston local chapter: https://www.score.org/tx/houston/
- How mentoring works: https://www.score.org/how-mentoring-works/
- What to expect: https://www.score.org/what-to-expect/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
